title: Losing prompt data when retrying from Merge node
symptom: When retrying a workflow after a Not Approved status, the prompt data becomes undefined due to incorrect referencing.
applies_when: Retrying after a Not Approved status
not_this_if: Prompt data is correctly referenced in the workflow
root_cause: The issue arises because the workflow is using relative references to access data from the Merge node, which can lead to undefined values when the flow is retried. This happens because the context of the data changes during the retry process.
fix_steps: Change the reference from `{{ $json.property }}` to `{{ $('Merge B').last().json.property }}`
Test the workflow again to ensure the prompt data is retained
agent_instruction: Update the reference in the Copywriter node to use the absolute reference for the Merge node.
